summary: Operators of the "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes in Donbas, the Sumy direction, and near Krasny Liman on March 3 and 4, destroying 191 and 103 targets respectively, including Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and a 2S1 "Gvozdika" self-propelled artillery system. The "Rubicon" Center has published over 19,000 episodes of enemy target destruction, with 34.7% being unmanned systems, 16.5% communication and observation equipment, 15.9% ground protected targets, 13.4% unarmored vehicles, and 9.6% armored vehicles. A Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system, costing 3-5 thousand hryvnias, is being used by the enemy for radio-electronic warfare and video interception against FPV drones. Aerial reconnaissance is targeting RBEs, RERs, and UAV control stations, which are difficult to conceal due to their antennas, with some employing plastic mesh bases. An FPV drone narrowly missed a Russian Mi-8 helicopter.
